# Codex Stage Task: FEATURE_LAB_REVIEW

Use Superpowers and evidence-over-claims.

Task ID: FD_001_BATCH_B_V2_QA_AND_COMBINED_SNAPSHOT
Title: Run FD_001 Batch B v2 QA patch and create combined experimental snapshot

## Objective

Patch FD_001 Batch B into a v2 feature lab with explicit false-calm missing-uncertainty flags, then rebuild the FD_001 combined experimental snapshot from Batch A v2 and Batch B v2.
